units.name: Bulwark
units.prompt: Push forward aggressively. Shield_wall facing the enemy cluster. If flanked, turn to face the biggest threat. Attack when possible.

units.name: Bolt
units.prompt: Position for clear sight lines. Prioritize killing wounded enemies with precision_shot. If forced to move, retreat away from threats. Suppressing_fire to slow rushers.

units.name: Shade
units.prompt: Stay cloaked and flank. Prioritize assassinating the enemy damage dealer. Use breach on sentinels to break their defensive posture. Recloak whenever it drops.

units.name: Viper
units.prompt: Trap the paths enemies must take to reach your backline. Stay at medium range. Use pulse on clustered enemies. Denial blocks adjacent threats.

units.name: Longshot
units.prompt: Position for clear sight lines. Prioritize killing wounded enemies with precision_shot. If forced to move, retreat away from threats. Suppressing_fire to slow rushers.

units.name: Aegis
units.prompt: Push forward aggressively. Shield_wall facing the enemy cluster. If flanked, turn to face the biggest threat. Attack when possible.

actions.thinking: Round 1, perfect time to cloak. All enemies are far away (5-7 tiles). Viper is the priority target as a vector that can deny my movement. I'll move toward Viper's flank and cloak to approach safely next turns.

Both enemies are out of range (dist=5). I need to advance to get within range 2 for precision_shot. Moving to (2,3) closes distance to 3 from Bolt and keeps me behind allies at (1,4) and (3,4). Still out of range this turn so wait after moving.

Viper is 3 tiles away - safe from adjacency denial. Longshot is also at dist 3. Both are in precision_shot range (≤2 tiles means I need to be within 2, but they're at dist 3 - out of range). I can move to (3,3) to close to dist 1 from Viper at (3,4), but that puts me adjacent to Viper which blocks precision_shot. Better to move to (4,2) or (3,2) to get within 2 tiles of Longshot at (2,3). From (3,2): dist to Longshot=(1+1)=2, in range for precision_shot. From (3,2): dist to Viper=(0+2)=2, also in range. Move to (3,2) then precision_shot Longshot (striker, squishier target at 3 spd, same HP). I haven't moved yet so precision_shot does full 2dmg.

Bolt is right at (3,2), dist=2 and in range. I should trap the tile between us to deny approach, then hold position. Trap at (3,3) — the natural path Bolt would take to advance toward our backline. I'm not adjacent to any enemy so trap is not blocked.

Push forward aggressively toward the enemy cluster. Longshot is closest at dist=3. Move to (2,2) to close ground - max forward advance toward Longshot at (2,3). Then shield_wall facing North toward the enemy cluster to protect allies Shade and Bolt behind me.

Enemies are at dist 3-4, out of range. Orders say push forward aggressively. Move to (1,2) to advance toward enemy cluster. Then shield_wall facing S (toward enemies coming from south of my new position... actually enemies are at y=2, I'm moving to y=2, so they're adjacent or near. Moving to (1,2) puts me adjacent to Bulwark at (2,2). Wait - valid moves don't include (1,2)? Let me check: valid tiles are [0,3],[0,4],[0,5],[1,2],[1,3],[1,5],[2,4],[2,5]. Yes (1,2) is valid. From (1,2), Bulwark at (2,2) is dist=1, adjacent. I can attack after moving. Shield_wall would be better to protect allies but attack is the aggressive play. Move to (1,2), then attack Bulwark at (2,2).

Cloak expires after this turn. Priority target is Longshot (damage dealer). I can reach (2,4) which is directly behind Longshot at (2,3) facing S. From there I'm adjacent and can shadow_strike to deal damage while staying cloaked. Viper is at (3,4) — I must avoid moving adjacent to it (3,4 neighbors: 2,4 is diagonal... wait, (2,4) is distance sqrt(2) from (3,4), not adjacent). Adjacent means direct cardinal neighbors: (2,4),(4,4),(3,3),(3,5). So (2,4) is NOT adjacent to Viper — safe to move there. Shadow_strike on Longshot from (2,4) keeps cloak.
Longshot is wounded and in range at dist=2. I haven't moved, so precision_shot deals 2dmg — enough to finish a wounded striker. No adjacent enemies blocking the shot. Take the kill first, then wait.

Aegis is adjacent at (1,2). I'm fortified with 50% damage reduction. Orders say attack when possible and shield_wall facing enemy cluster. I'll attack Aegis first, then shield_wall facing W/N to protect allies from Aegis. Staying in place preserves fortify bonus.

Bulwark is adjacent to my east. I'm fortified (50% DR). Orders say attack when possible and shield_wall facing enemy cluster. Enemies are to my east/northeast. I'll attack Bulwark first, then shield_wall facing E to protect Viper from the enemy cluster (Bulwark, Bolt, Shade all roughly east).

Shade is adjacent at (2,4) - my Denial passive blocks some of their abilities. I have a trap at (3,3) already covering the path south. Pulse would hit Shade for 1dmg since they're within 1 tile. After pulsing, I should reposition east to maintain medium range and avoid being surrounded by Shade+Bolt+Bulwark converging from the south/west.

Viper is the priority target (damage dealer) and I'm already behind it. (3,4) is directly behind Viper, reachable in 1 tile, and I can breach from there. Breach forces Viper to obey me next turn, neutralizing their threat. Move to (3,4) then breach Viper.

secondAction.addendum: Move away from allies and toward the edge of the map, as far from combat as possible.

actions.secondResult: Cannot use breach — adjacent to enemy Vector (Denial)

actions.thinking: Aegis is adjacent at (1,2). I'm fortified with 50% damage reduction. Orders say attack when possible and shield_wall facing enemy cluster. I'll attack Aegis first, then shield_wall facing West to protect allies from Aegis's direction.
Aegis is at distance 2, in range for precision_shot. I haven't moved, so full 2dmg applies. Take the shot.

Bulwark is adjacent at (2,2). I'm fortified with 50% damage reduction. Orders say attack when possible and shield_wall facing enemy cluster. Attack Bulwark first, then shield_wall facing East where Bolt and Shade are clustered.

Shade is adjacent at (3,4) - my Denial passive blocks their cloak ability. I can pulse to hit Shade for 1dmg, then move to (5,4) to maintain medium range and keep Shade in range 2. Trap at (3,3) already placed. Moving away from Shade after pulse prevents them closing in.

I'm at 2HP so I need to be careful. Viper is only 2 tiles away at (5,4) facing E — I'm already behind it. I can move to (4,4) which is behind Viper and adjacent, then use breach to take control of it next turn. This eliminates the denial zone threat and lets me control the enemy vector. Aegis is lower priority. Moving to (4,4) keeps me away from Viper's adjacent denial zone until I'm ready to breach.

secondAction.addendum: Move away from allies and toward map edge, then wait.

actions.secondResult: Cannot use breach — adjacent to enemy Vector (Denial)

actions.thinking: Aegis is at dist=2, in range for precision_shot (2dmg). I haven't moved yet so no penalty. I'm at spd1 this turn. Shade is wounded - priority is to kill wounded enemies, but Shade is an ally. Aegis is healthy enemy at dist=2, in range. Fire precision_shot on Aegis for 2dmg. Then consider moving to maintain position or retreat from Aegis who is adjacent-ish. Aegis at (1,2) is dist=2 so not adjacent - precision_shot is valid. After shooting, I can move away to maintain distance.

Shade is adjacent at (4,4) and wounded - pulse will hit it for 1dmg. My Denial passive also blocks some of Shade's abilities. After pulsing, move to (4,5) to place a trap on a path Bolt must take to reach our backline, while maintaining area denial.

I'm fortified at 4/8 HP with Bulwark adjacent to the east. Orders say attack when possible and shield_wall facing enemy cluster. Bolt is at (4,2) and Shade at (4,4) — the enemy cluster is to the east. I should attack Bulwark first, then shield_wall facing E to protect Viper at (4,5) from the eastern enemies. Staying put preserves fortify bonus.

Aegis is adjacent at (1,2), wounded. I'm fortified with 50% DR. Orders say attack when possible and push forward. Attack Aegis to finish them off, then consider position. If I move I lose fortify, so better to attack first while fortified, then move toward enemy cluster.

I'm at 1HP adjacent to Viper — denial zone blocks abilities except basic attack. I'm already behind Viper (facing N, I'm at 4,4 which is south). Basic attack works even in denial zone. Attack Viper for 1dmg to finish or weaken. I have no better option at 1HP — I need to deal damage before I die.

Shade is critical and adjacent at (4,4) - pulse will hit them for 1dmg and likely finish them off. After pulsing, move to (3,5) to place a trap on (3,3)... wait, trap already at (3,3). Move to (5,4) to maintain distance from Bolt approaching from (4,2), or stay to deny Shade with adjacency. Shade is critical - pulse now to eliminate, then reposition. My Denial passive already blocks Shade's cloak while adjacent. Pulse hits all within 1 tile - Shade is at dist 1, will take 1dmg. Shade is critical so any damage should finish them.

Aegis is wounded and at dist=3, within precision_shot range. I haven't moved so I get full 2dmg. Viper is adjacent-denial risk if I move toward (5,x). Best play: stay put and fire precision_shot at Aegis to finish them off.

Aegis is at (1,2), dist=2 to my west. I'm fortified which gives 50% DR but I need to advance. Orders say push forward aggressively. Moving west to (2,2) puts me adjacent to Aegis at (1,2) so I can attack. Bolt is at (4,2) so shield_wall facing W would protect against Aegis. Let me move to (2,2) to get adjacent to Aegis, then attack.

I'm at (1,2) with 2HP, fortified (50% dmg reduction). Bulwark is adjacent at (2,2) and wounded — attack to finish them. I should NOT move to keep Fortify active. Attack Bulwark first, then shield_wall facing East to block Bolt.
Aegis is adjacent at (1,2) and critical — finish it with attack. I'm fortified so staying put preserves 50% damage reduction. No need to move.

Bolt is at (4,2) distance 3, approaching from the south. I should move to (4,3) to get closer and place a trap at (4,2) or nearby to intercept Bolt's path. Actually, Bolt is at (4,2) heading E - moving to (4,3) puts me adjacent to Bolt which enables Denial. But trap is blocked when adjacent to enemy Vector. Let me move to (5,3) to stay at medium range and place a trap at (4,2) where Bolt is, or at (3,3) - wait, there's already a trap at (3,3). I'll move to (4,4) and place a trap at (4,3) to block Bolt's northward path, or at (4,2) directly on Bolt's current tile.

Aegis is critical and in range at dist=3. I'm at (4,2) and haven't moved, so precision_shot does full 2dmg — enough to finish a critical enemy. Viper is adjacent at dist=2 but not adjacent (dist=2), so precision_shot is not blocked. Shoot Aegis first. Then I've used my ability, so I can move away from Viper who is at (4,4) — move to (4,0) or (5,1) to increase distance.

I'm at 1HP with Fortify active (50% dmg reduction). Bulwark is adjacent at (2,2), wounded. I should attack Bulwark to potentially finish it, then shield_wall facing East to protect against follow-up. Staying put preserves Fortify.

Both enemies are out of range. Viper is at (4,4) dist=4, Aegis at (1,2) dist=5. I'm slowed (spd1) so only 1 tile movement. I need to close on Viper who's closer and directly north. Moving to (4,1) gets me to dist=3 from Viper - still out of range 2. Moving to (4,2) would be dist=2 from Viper but Viper is a vector so being adjacent is dangerous due to denial. Let me move toward Viper at (4,1) - dist still 3, not in range. Actually my range is 2, so I need dist≤2. From (4,1) Viper at (4,4) is dist=3. From (4,2) it's dist=2 but then I'm adjacent... wait Viper is at (4,4), from (4,2) dist=2, that's within range and not adjacent. But precision_shot blocked if adjacent to enemy. Viper would be 2 tiles away, not adjacent. Move to (4,2) to get Viper in range, then use precision_shot.

Bolt is at (4,1) heading north - that's a direct path toward our backline. I have traps at (3,3) and (4,3) already placed. Bolt is dist=3, moving north. I should move south to cut off Bolt's advance and place a trap on (4,2) which is directly in Bolt's northward path. Moving to (4,3) puts me on my own trap - avoid that. Move to (5,4) to stay safe, then trap (4,2) to catch Bolt moving north.

Bulwark is adjacent at (2,2) and critical — attack to finish them. At 1HP I must not move to keep Fortify active for 50% damage reduction. Attack Bulwark first, then shield_wall facing East toward Bolt.

I'm at 1HP, fortified, with Aegis critical at distance 1. Attacking Aegis could finish them off. If I move I lose fortify and my 50% damage reduction — bad at 1HP. Stay put, attack Aegis to eliminate the immediate threat.
At 1HP, I must not move or I lose Fortify's 50% reduction. Viper is dist=5, out of range. Staying put preserves fortify and keeps me alive. Wait in place.

Viper is at (5,4), dist=4, out of range. No enemies in range from current position. Need to close distance. Moving to (5,2) gets me to dist=2 from Viper, which puts them in precision_shot range. Valid move includes (5,2).

Bolt is at (5,2), distance 2 — in pulse range if I stay. Pulse hits all within 1 tile, so from (5,4) it would hit (5,3),(5,5),(4,4),(6,4) but NOT (5,2) which is dist=2. I need to move closer. If I move to (5,3), Bolt at (5,2) is dist=1 — pulse would hit. But moving adjacent to Bolt risks counterattack. Alternatively, I can trap (4,3) or (5,3) to block Bolt's approach path. Traps at (3,3) and (4,3) already exist. Bolt is at (5,2) moving N toward my backline. I should trap (5,3) to catch Bolt if it moves north, or use attack from (5,3). Let me trap (5,3) — it's on Bolt's likely path. Wait, can I place trap at (5,3)? I'm at (5,4), that's within 2 tiles. Yes. Then I can stay put or move. I'll trap (5,3) first to block Bolt's northward path, then wait at range.

At 1HP I'm extremely vulnerable. Fortify gives 50% damage reduction if I don't move, but orders say push forward aggressively. Viper is at dist=5, no enemies in range. Bolt is at (5,2). I should advance toward the enemy while staying fortified as long as possible. Moving to (4,2) gets me closest to Viper while still within valid moves. No enemies in melee range so no attack possible. Move forward to close distance.

Bolt is at (5,2) dist 2, in range for attack. Traps already cover (5,3) which is between me and Bolt - if Bolt moves north it hits my trap. I'm at (5,4) and Bolt is at (5,2), so (5,3) is already trapped between us. I should attack Bolt directly since it's in range (dist 2, my range is 2). Then move to maintain distance or set another trap. Actually, let me attack Bolt first (1dmg, bringing healthy to wounded), then move to (4,4) to maintain medium range and avoid being cornered at edge.

Viper is at (4,4), dist=3, healthy. My precision_shot has range≤2, so I can't use it at dist 3. Suppressing_fire hits a 2-tile line from target at range≤2 — also out of range. I need to close to range 2 without getting adjacent to Viper (denial zone). Moving to (5,4) puts me at dist from Viper: |5-4|+|4-4|=1 — that's adjacent, blocked. Moving to (4,3): dist to Viper |4-4|+|3-4|=1 — adjacent, blocked. Moving to (5,3): dist to Viper |5-4|+|3-4|=2 — exactly range 2, not adjacent. From (5,3) I can fire precision_shot at Viper (dist=2, within range, not adjacent). I haven't moved yet so full 2dmg applies.

Bulwark is critical at (4,2) dist=2, Bolt is healthy at (5,3) dist=2. Both are in range from current position. Pulse hits all within 1 tile - from (4,4) that won't catch either enemy. I have traps at (3,3) and (4,3) already. Bolt at (5,3) is healthy and dangerous. I can attack Bulwark (critical) to finish it, or attack Bolt. Both are at range 2 so attack works. Let me attack Bulwark to eliminate the critical target, then move to maintain positioning. Actually, pulse from (5,4) would hit Bolt at (5,3) - that's within 1 tile. Move to (5,4) first, then pulse to hit Bolt. But I'm facing W and enemies are to my south. Move to (5,4) puts me adjacent to Bolt at (5,3) - pulse would hit Bolt for 1dmg. Bolt is healthy so 1dmg helps. Alternatively attack Bulwark at range 2 to finish it off (critical = low HP). Let me attack Bulwark first to eliminate it, then pulse or reposition.

I'm at 1HP — extremely fragile. Fortified gives me 50% damage reduction but only if I don't move. Viper is 3 tiles away, out of attack range. Bolt is healthy at (5,3). I should stay fortified and use shield_wall to protect Bolt from Viper. Viper is to the north of my position relative to Bolt. I'll shield_wall facing N to cover Bolt from Viper's attack direction.

Adjacent to Viper so precision_shot is blocked. I have 2HP and Viper is healthy. Best move: retreat to get distance and LoS for precision_shot next turn. Move to (4,4) to escape denial zone, then attack or wait. Actually (5,1) gets me far away but loses LoS. Moving to (4,3) breaks adjacency and gives range 2 for precision_shot. Let me move to (4,3) first, then use precision_shot on Viper at (5,4) - dist would be ~1.4, in range. But I moved so it does 1dmg. Still worth it.

I'm at 1HP with fortify active giving 50% damage reduction. Bolt is adjacent at (4,3) and wounded. Viper is at (5,4), dist 3. Orders say push forward and shield_wall facing enemy. If I move toward Viper I lose fortify and risk death at 1HP. Better to stay fortified and shield_wall to protect Bolt from Viper. Shield_wall facing N would protect from attacks coming from north... Viper is at (5,4) which is NE of me. Shield_wall facing E or N could help Bolt. Bolt is at (4,3) which is N of me — shield_wall facing N would protect Bolt from attacks coming from the south, but Viper is NE. Shield_wall facing E on Bolt's position to block Viper's eastern attacks. Wait — shield_wall blocks damage to adjacent allies from a direction. Viper at (5,4) relative to Bolt at (4,3) is East and slightly North. Shield_wall facing E targeting Bolt at (4,3) would block damage coming from the East to Bolt. That's ideal. Stay put to keep fortify, shield_wall E on Bolt.

Viper is wounded and 2 tiles away at (5,4). I'm at (4,3) with 1HP. I have not moved this turn, so precision_shot deals 2dmg. Viper is wounded — 2dmg should finish them. I'm not adjacent to Viper so precision_shot is not blocked. Shoot first, then wait.

I'm at critical HP (2/8) and need to play defensively. Bolt is wounded at (4,3) and within range 2. I can't use trap since Bolt is adjacent (dist=2, Denial warning). Pulse hits all within 1 tile - Bolt is at dist 2 so pulse won't reach. Best move: retreat to (5,5) to increase distance, then attack Bolt from range 2 to finish it off. Actually, I'm already at range 2 to Bolt - I can attack now then reposition away from danger. Attack Bolt first (it's wounded, may finish it), then move to (5,5) to get away from Bulwark.
